briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether the TRNG FSM has an idle timer.
Symbol indicating whether the TRNG has entropy blending.

detaileddescription.para: Size of the RNG FIFO in bytes
XOR bits inside each ring oscillator set
Also XOR bits in-between ring oscillator sets
On top of XOR_LEVEL_2 apply VON-NEUMANN debiasing
RNG is idle, and ready to produce more data
RNG is idle, with the ring oscillators off
RNG is filling the FIFO with entropy
RNG has halted on an error. Reset is needed

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the control register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the RNG peripheral.
Configuration to be written in the register.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the FIFO level.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the RNG peripheral.

simplesect.para: Number of random data words ready in the FIFO

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the AES conditioning KEY registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the RNG peripheral.
Index of the key register to be written (0..3)
Value to be written in the register.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the RNG FSM state.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the RNG peripheral.

simplesect.para: State of the FSM, one of nrf_cracen_rng_fsm_state_t values.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the initialization wait counter value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the RNG peripheral.
Value to be written in the register.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the switch off timer value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the RNG peripheral.
Value to be written in the register.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the entropy subsampling rate register.

simplesect.para: The ring oscillators output is sampled at Fs=Fpclk/(ClkDiv+1)

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the RNG peripheral.
Value to be written in the register.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting a word from the entropy FIFO.

simplesect.para: The caller must ensure there is enough data by calling nrf_cracen_rng_fifo_level_get

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the RNG peripheral

simplesect.para: Entropy word read from the FIFO
